title: Hafiz
content:
When Hafiz saw the portrait free,
    By Monty Flagg, of him and me,
    He made remarks one can't repeat
    In any reputable sheet.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "Hafiz"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
